text.message: I can get strong from u
I stole a Knight from u because I can only get basic from yellow
I'm in last place and u inventored me?
It’s not like you’re getting crushed it’s a close game
I'm Way behind. I haven't built anything
u did it to me when I was at 3 points
Yellow and blue are ahead fo me
u soloing me is so idiotic
don't try to say u wanted a 9 and there's other 9s
It doesn’t matter why I did it it’s my turn leave me alone
ur playing moves that aren't good
Long term is u and yellow, not me
especially when he asks why I stole from him instead of yellow, he knew  he's in the lead
learn to not target people in last place
red i have coin if you need, i can trade you
I barely get it. Won't need it for a while
i will keep it for you then
build a road if you can
How do you know I have another?
I'm just playing this to get it over with. Once I go the wood 11, it screwed me
i could have gotten it with aqueduct
didn't want to risk him intriguing my Knight once I build the settle
i have 2 coin now, if it helps you
Is this level of colab allowed?
yes only king making isn't allowed
yes, me and red is trying to survive lol
if you get metro, we both lose
King making is trading to make me win. this is to make it so u don't get metro
and it's a pretty fair trade anyway
yea i got nothing out of it pretty much lol
surprise you use alchemist to roll 4 instead of 10 black
i have win in hand red
